name: Go Life International Limited
summary: Go Life International Limited, a healthcare company, distributes health products focusing on the nutraceuticals and cosmeceuticals markets in South Africa and internationally. It also offers pharmaceutical and generic products, medical consumables, and hospital equipment. In addition, the company operates four frail care centers in the Western Cape. Further, it is involved in the investment and holding activities. The company sells its products through stockists and an online shop. The company was formerly known as Go Life International PCC and changed its name to Go Life International Ltd in March 2015. Go Life International Ltd was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Knysna, South Africa.
